title: <div>  •  Use a single narrative manager to handle story triggers across eras.</
content:
• Use a single narrative manager to handle story triggers across eras.
Challenges to Mitigate:
• Keep interludes brief to avoid disrupting gameplay.
• Ensure narrative content is culturally sensitive and inclusive.
8. Toolchain & Implementation Pipeline
Approach:
• Asset Creation: Use Blender for 3D models, Substance Painter for PBR textures, and FMOD for audio. Export to glTF for Unity compatibility.
• CI/CD: Set up GitHub Actions for automated asset validation, build testing, and deployment to TestFlight (iOS) and Play Store (Android).
• Analytics: Use Firebase Analytics to track tutorial completion, hint usage, and era popularity. Integrate PlaytestCloud for user testing.
• Iterative Roadmap:
1 Month 1-2: Asset pipeline (Roman Villa), core 3D scaffold, touch UX.
2 Month 3-4: Physics, AR mode, audio integration.
3 Month 5-6: AI chaperone, tutorials, backend persistence.
4 Month 7-8: Multiplayer, accessibility, community toolkit.
5 Month 9-10: Polish, playtesting, analytics, launch.
